// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers services. Services with tags are only registered when matching tags are passed.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="services">The service collection.</param>
        /// <param name="tags">Optional tags to filter which services to register.</param>
        public static global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this global::Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection services, params global::System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> tags)
        {
            if (!tags.Any())
            {
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency1, global::TestNamespace.Dependency1>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency2, global::TestNamespace.Dependency2>();
                services.AddSingleton<global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::TestNamespace.MyService>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
                {
                    async global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::TestNamespace.MyService> Init()
                    {
                        var s0_m0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency1>();
                        var s0_m1 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency2>();
                        var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.MyService();
                        await s0.InitStep1(s0_m0);
                        await s0.InitStep2(s0_m1);
                        return s0;
                    }
                    return Init();
                });
                services.AddSingleton<global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>>(async (global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => await sp.GetRequiredService<global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<global::TestNamespace.MyService>>());
            }

            return services;
        }
    }
}
